syllogism: All roses are flowers. Some flowers are red. Every tulip is a plant. All flowers are plants. Some roses are fragrant. Therefore, all roses are plants.
All cats are mammals. Some mammals can swim. Every whale is aquatic. Some birds can fly. Therefore, all cats can swim.
All squares are rectangles. All rectangles are polygons. Some polygons are blue. Every triangle has three sides. Therefore, all squares are polygons.
Some dogs are reptiles. All reptiles lay eggs. Some mammals have fur. Every snake is a reptile. Therefore, some dogs lay eggs.
All laptops are computers. All computers process data. Some devices are portable. Every smartphone is a device. Therefore, all laptops process data.
Some apples are vehicles. All vehicles have engines. Every fruit grows on trees. Some trees are tall. Therefore, some apples have engines.
All birds have wings. All sparrows are birds. Some animals are nocturnal. Every owl is nocturnal. Therefore, all sparrows have wings.
All fish can fly. Some birds are mammals. Every mammal breathes air. Some fish swim. Therefore, all fish breathe air.
All teachers are educated. All educated people read books. Some people play sports. Every athlete trains daily. Therefore, all teachers read books.
Some chairs are animals. All animals breathe. Every table is furniture. Some furniture is wooden. Therefore, some chairs breathe.
All cars have wheels. All vehicles have wheels. Some bikes are vehicles. Every engine burns fuel. Therefore, all cars are vehicles.
All mammals are animals. All dogs are mammals. Some animals are pets. Every pet is loved. Therefore, all dogs are animals.
Some books are edible. All edible things are tasty. Every library contains books. Some books are old. Therefore, some books are tasty.
All planets orbit stars. All Earth-like bodies are planets. Some stars are massive. Every galaxy contains stars. Therefore, all Earth-like bodies orbit stars.
All musicians are silent. Some silent things are loud. Every instrument makes sound. Some sounds are pleasant. Therefore, all musicians are loud.
All engineers solve problems. All problem solvers think critically. Some people like puzzles. Every puzzle is challenging. Therefore, all engineers think critically.
Some clouds are computers. All computers run programs. Every sky contains clouds. Some programs crash. Therefore, some clouds run programs.
All poets write words. All writers use language. Some languages are complex. Every book contains words. Therefore, all poets use language.
All stones are alive. Some alive things fly. Every bird flies. Some birds sing. Therefore, all stones fly.
All programmers write code. All code runs on machines. Some machines are fast. Every computer is a machine. Therefore, all programmers write code that runs on machines.
Some pens are animals. All animals eat food. Every desk holds pens. Some desks are wooden. Therefore, some pens eat food.
All chefs cook food. All cooks prepare meals. Some meals are delicious. Every kitchen has tools. Therefore, all chefs prepare meals.
All rivers are dry. Some dry things are wet. Every lake holds water. Some water evaporates. Therefore, all rivers are wet.
All students learn. All learners gain knowledge. Some people read books. Every book contains information. Therefore, all students gain knowledge.
Some mountains are computers. All computers process data. Every mountain is tall. Some tall things are visible. Therefore, some mountains process data.
All doctors treat patients. All people who treat patients help others. Some helpers are volunteers. Every volunteer works. Therefore, all doctors help others.
All chairs can think. Some thinkers are humans. Every human walks. Some walks are long. Therefore, all chairs are humans.
All flowers grow. All growing things need water. Some water is clean. Every plant grows. Therefore, all flowers need water.
Some computers are bananas. All bananas are fruits. Every fruit is edible. Some fruits are sweet. Therefore, some computers are edible.
All athletes train. All people who train improve. Some improvements are noticeable. Every gym has equipment. Therefore, all athletes improve.
All pencils are animals. Some animals fly. Every bird flies. Some birds migrate. Therefore, all pencils fly.
All lawyers study law. All people who study law read books. Some books are long. Every library has books. Therefore, all lawyers read books.
Some trees are vehicles. All vehicles move. Every tree grows. Some trees are tall. Therefore, some trees move.
All scientists conduct research. All researchers discover things. Some discoveries are important. Every lab conducts experiments. Therefore, all scientists discover things.
All tables can swim. Some swimmers are fish. Every fish lives in water. Some water is cold. Therefore, all tables live in water.
All singers perform. All performers entertain. Some entertainment is enjoyable. Every stage hosts performers. Therefore, all singers entertain.
Some shoes are animals. All animals breathe. Every shoe is worn. Some worn things are old. Therefore, some shoes breathe.
All teachers instruct students. All instructors explain concepts. Some concepts are difficult. Every class has students. Therefore, all teachers explain concepts.
All clouds are machines. Some machines compute. Every computer computes. Some computations are fast. Therefore, all clouds compute.
All artists create works. All creators produce outputs. Some outputs are valuable. Every gallery shows works. Therefore, all artists produce outputs.
Some lakes are computers. All computers process data. Every lake contains water. Some water is deep. Therefore, some lakes process data.
All nurses care for patients. All caregivers help people. Some people are grateful. Every hospital has nurses. Therefore, all nurses help people.
All rocks are animals. Some animals run. Every runner moves. Some movement is fast. Therefore, all rocks run.
All drivers operate vehicles. All operators control machines. Some machines are complex. Every road has vehicles. Therefore, all drivers control machines.
Some cups are animals. All animals eat food. Every cup holds liquid. Some liquids are hot. Therefore, some cups eat food.
All writers create text. All creators produce content. Some content is published. Every book contains text. Therefore, all writers produce content.
All doors can speak. Some speakers are humans. Every human communicates. Some communication is verbal. Therefore, all doors communicate.
All engineers design systems. All designers create structures. Some structures are complex. Every factory builds systems. Therefore, all engineers create structures.
Some pencils are computers. All computers process data. Every pencil writes. Some writing is neat. Therefore, some pencils process data.

All pharmacists dispense medicine. All people who dispense medicine work in healthcare. Some healthcare workers are busy. Every hospital employs pharmacists. Therefore, all pharmacists work in healthcare.
